text:
3 = Extensive Assistance - While resident performed part of activity, over last 7 day period, help of following type(s) provided 3 or more times: Weight bearing support - Full staff performance during part (but not all) of last 7 days, 4 = Total Dependence - Full staff performance of activity during entire 7 days, 8 = Activity did not occur during entire 7 days.
217 G1FB G1FB_SUPP_LOC_OFFU (G1FB) Locomotion off Unit Support Provided CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems:
